newQuiz.stem: Neither the teacher nor her students ___ aware that the fire drill ___ scheduled for that very morning.
newQuiz.explanation: neither A nor B 的動詞與『最靠近的主詞』一致(就近原則),students 雖為複數,但 B=her students... 等等,實際就近主詞是 students(複數)? 須細看:『neither the teacher nor her students』最近主詞為 students(複數),故主句動詞應為 were。但兩個動詞需整體判斷:演習在過去某時間點之前已被安排,用過去完成 had been。故主句若依就近原則為 were;然而本題正解設計為 was/were 之爭——標準就近原則取最近名詞 students(複數)→ were。再檢查:第二空 the fire drill(單數)被安排,過去完成被動 had been scheduled。綜合最符合就近原則者為 were; had been。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ 此處易被『neither...nor 一律單數』的迷思誤導;就近原則看最近的 students(複數)用 were,且演習在過去敘述點前已排定,用過去完成被動 had been scheduled。

newQuiz.stem: ___ had the manager finished his speech ___ the audience began to applaud loudly.
newQuiz.explanation: 『No sooner...had + S + p.p. ...than + 過去式』表『一…就…』,倒裝句固定搭配 no sooner...than。句首否定副詞 No sooner 引導倒裝(had the manager finished),對應連接詞為 than,故選 No sooner; than。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ Hardly/Scarcely 雖也可倒裝表『一…就…』,但須搭配 when(Hardly...when),不可配 then;No sooner 固定配 than，固定搭配不可混用。

newQuiz.stem: Only after the storm had passed ___ to assess the damage to their fishing boats.
newQuiz.explanation: 『Only + 副詞片語』置於句首時,主句須部分倒裝:助動詞(did)提前 + 主詞 + 原形動詞,故 did the villagers go out。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ Only after... 置句首觸發倒裝,須用助動詞 did + 主詞 + 原形 go;直接寫 the villagers went out(正常語序)是最常見錯誤,全動詞倒裝 went the villagers 亦不合英語規則。

newQuiz.stem: So ___ was the evidence that the jury reached a verdict in less than an hour.
newQuiz.explanation: 『So + 形容詞 + be 動詞 + 主詞 + that...』倒裝結構,空格須為形容詞修飾 evidence。證據『令人信服的』用現在分詞轉的形容詞 convincing(主動,使人信服)。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ 此為 So...that 倒裝(So convincing was the evidence);形容詞修飾事物用 -ing(convincing);convinced(被說服的)用於人,convincingly 是副詞,皆不符語法位置。

newQuiz.stem: It was not the price but the poor quality of the product ___ the customers to complain.
newQuiz.explanation: 強調句型 It was...that...,被強調者為 not the price but the poor quality(主詞),其後用關係詞 that,動詞 caused 對應整個強調主詞。故 that caused。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ 強調句一律用 that,不論被強調者為人或物;what 不能引導強調句,which it caused 多餘加了 it,單純 caused 則缺少 that 使句子缺連接成分。

newQuiz.stem: ___ you to lend me your notes, I would be able to catch up with the missed lessons quickly.
newQuiz.explanation: 與現在事實相反的假設,省略 if 時 be 動詞 were 倒裝至句首:Were you to lend me...(= If you were to lend me...),表對未來不太可能的假設。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ 此為與未來相反假設的 were to 倒裝句(Were S to V);Should 倒裝後須接原形且語意為『萬一』,Had 用於與過去相反(Had + p.p.),If 則無法倒裝且後句缺 would 對應,須用 Were。

newQuiz.stem: The committee insisted that every application ___ submitted before the deadline, or it ___ rejected without exception.
newQuiz.explanation: insist that 後接『假設語氣』:S + (should) + 原形,故 be submitted(被動原形)。後半 or it... 表結果,與主句語氣一致用 would be rejected。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ insist/demand/require 等要求動詞後的 that 子句用『(should) + 原形動詞』(be submitted),不可用 was/is;後句 or 引導的結果配合語氣用 would be。

newQuiz.stem: Not until she had read the contract three times ___ the hidden clause that could cost her thousands.
newQuiz.explanation: Not until... 置句首,主句倒裝:did + 主詞 + 原形,故 did she notice。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ Not until 在句首使主句倒裝(did she notice),不是 until 子句本身倒裝;直接寫 she noticed 未倒裝是常見錯,noticed she 為全動詞倒裝不合規。

newQuiz.stem: ___ how fragile the ecosystem was, the researchers urged the government to act immediately.
newQuiz.explanation: 分詞構句:主詞 the researchers 與 realize 為主動關係(研究者意識到),用現在分詞 Realizing 引導,= Because they realized how fragile...。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ 分詞構句須判斷主詞與動詞的主被動;研究者『主動』意識到,用 Realizing(主動);Realized/Having been realized 是被動,語意不通,To realize 表目的不符因果語境。

newQuiz.stem: Such ___ that the entire stadium fell silent the moment she stepped onto the stage.
newQuiz.explanation: 『Such + be 動詞 + 主詞 + that...』倒裝句:Such was her fame that...(她如此出名,以致於…),be 動詞 was 提前至 Such 之後。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ Such 置句首觸發 be 動詞倒裝(Such was her fame);her fame was 未倒裝,加 it 多餘,did...be 文法錯誤(be 動詞不需助動詞 did)。

newQuiz.stem: The harder the team practiced, ___ they became, until they finally won the championship.
newQuiz.explanation: 『The + 比較級..., the + 比較級...』表『越…就越…』。confident 為多音節形容詞,比較級用 more confident,前加 the,故 the more confident。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ The + 比較級...the + 比較級 兩邊都要 the 且都用『比較級』;漏掉 the(more confident)或誤用最高級(the most confident)皆錯,語序 the confident more 也不對。

newQuiz.stem: Rarely ___ such a brilliant solution proposed by someone so young and inexperienced.
newQuiz.explanation: 否定副詞 Rarely 置句首觸發倒裝,完成式助動詞 have 提前:have we seen。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ Rarely/Seldom/Never 等否定副詞置句首須倒裝(have we seen);未倒裝的 we have seen 錯,did we saw 同時用助動詞與過去式動詞為雙重錯誤。

newQuiz.stem: He spoke ___ confidently ___ everyone in the room assumed he was the real expert.
newQuiz.explanation: confidently 為副詞,『so + 副詞 + that...』表『如此…以致於…』,故 so confidently that。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ so 修飾形容詞/副詞(so confidently),such 修飾名詞片語;此處 confidently 是副詞,須用 so...that,不可用 such;too...to 表『太…以致不能』語意相反。

newQuiz.stem: What surprised the judges most ___ not his technique but his fearless attitude toward failure.
newQuiz.explanation: 主詞為名詞子句 What surprised the judges most,視為單數,動詞用 was;補語 not A but B 結構不影響主詞單複數。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ What 引導的名詞子句作主詞時恆視為『單數』,用 was;別被後面 not...but... 或補語的名詞迷惑而誤用複數 were。

newQuiz.stem: Long ___ the days when people had to walk miles just to send a single message.
newQuiz.explanation: 表語(Long gone)置句首的完全倒裝,主詞 the days 為複數,be 動詞用 are,語序為 Long gone are the days...(那些日子已一去不返)。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ 形容詞/分詞表語置句首引發完全倒裝(Long gone are the days);主詞 days 複數須用 are,gone is 主謂不一致,have gone 用了完成式不符此慣用倒裝句型。

newQuiz.stem: Provided that the weather ___ fine tomorrow, the outdoor concert ___ as planned.
newQuiz.explanation: Provided that(假如)引導條件子句,屬條件副詞子句『現在式表未來』,用 stays;主句指未來用 will proceed。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ 條件子句(Provided that...)中『現在式代替未來』(stays),不可用 will;主句才用 will proceed;兩處都用現在式或時態錯配皆不符。

newQuiz.stem: It is high time the government ___ serious action to reduce air pollution in major cities.
newQuiz.explanation: 『It is (high) time + 主詞 + 過去式』表『早該…了(但還沒做)』的假設語氣,用過去式 took。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ It is high time 後的子句用『過去式』表現在早該做卻未做的虛擬語氣(took);用現在式 takes 或未來 will take 是最常見錯誤。

newQuiz.stem: ___ he apologize sincerely, his teammates might still be willing to forgive his mistake.
newQuiz.explanation: 與未來相反/不確定的假設,省略 if 用 Should 倒裝至句首接原形動詞:Should he apologize...(= If he should apologize),表『萬一/要是他道歉』。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ 後接原形動詞 apologize,須用 Should 倒裝(萬一);Were 倒裝後須接 to V 或形容詞,Had 用於與過去相反(接 p.p.),Did 不用於倒裝假設句。

newQuiz.stem: Across the valley ___ the ancient temple that thousands of pilgrims visit each spring.
newQuiz.explanation: 地方副詞片語(Across the valley)置句首的完全倒裝,主詞 the ancient temple 為單數,動詞用現在式 stands(visit each spring 表習慣性現在事實)。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ 地方副詞置句首引發完全倒裝,動詞須與『真正主詞 temple(單數)』一致用 stands;誤看 valley 或被句末複數 pilgrims 干擾而用 stand 為錯,進行式/過去式與『每年春天造訪』的恆常語境不合。

newQuiz.stem: No matter how carefully you plan, ___ unexpected problems still arise during a long journey.
newQuiz.explanation: there are times when...(有時候…)為固定句型,times 複數用 are,修飾時間先行詞用關係副詞 when,故 there are times when。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ 修飾『時間 times』的關係詞用 when 不可用 which/that(which 須在子句中作主受詞,此處 problems arise 結構完整);主詞 times 複數須用 are,it has times 句構亦錯。

newQuiz.stem: She would have caught the early train ___ she ___ ten minutes earlier instead of checking her phone.
newQuiz.explanation: 與過去事實相反的假設:主句 would have caught(過去未發生),條件子句用過去完成 had left,連接詞用 if,故 if she had left。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ 與過去相反的假設,if 子句用『過去完成 had left』,主句用 would have + p.p.;用過去式 left(if; left)是與現在相反的時態錯配,unless(除非)會使語意相反。
